calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-27-2018 Off Calendar

Plaintiff 20 Romolo I7, Lp Request For Prove-Up Hearing Re Application Requesting Court Judgment For Quiet Title
Off Calendar Mar-01-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514. Judge: Cynthia Ming-Mei Lee. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Gena Eales, CSR 176. Telephone: 406-381-1645.

Abram P. Petersen, Esq. appeared for plaintiff 20 Romolo 17, LP, a Delaware limited partnership.
No appearance by defaulted defendant all persons claiming any legal or equitable right, title, estate, lien or interest in the property commonly known as 20 Romolo Place, San Francisco, CA.
The following individuals were placed under oath and testified for plaintiff:

(1) Scott Moore, Senior Regional Property Manager for 20 Romolo 17, LP;
(2) Patrick Hanranan, Paralegal at Lubin Olson & Niewiadomski, LLP,; and
(3) Peter Beckey, Surveryor at KCA Engineering, Inc., who surveyed the property in question on June 12, 2017.

Plaintiff's Quiet Title Complaint was filed on 8/15/17.
Lis Pendens was recorded with the San Francisco County Clerk's Office on 8/22/17.
Notice of Lis Pendens was filed with the Clerk's Office on 8/27/18.
Proof of Publication of Summons & Complaint was filed on 10/12/17.
Default was entered against defendant on 12/1/17.
DOE Defendants were dismissed today, 3/1/18.

The following exhibits were marked for identification by plaintiff 20 Romolo 17, LP and admitted into evidence:

Exhibit 1: Copy of Grant Deed for 20 Romolo Place, San Francisco, CA dated June 22, 2017;
Exhibit 2: Copy of Decree Quiting Title dated August 13, 1908;
Exhibit 3: Copy of Grant Deed dated March 27, 1940;
Exhibit 4: Copy of Grant Deed dated April 5, 1940;
Exhibit 5: Copy of Grant Deed dated January 12, 1946;
Exhibit 6: Copy of Grant Deed dated August 29, 1974;
Exhibit 7: Copy of Grant Deed dated September 21, 2004; and
Exhibit 8: Copy of the survey of 20 Romolo Place, San Francisco, CA prepered by Peter Beckey of KCA Engineers, Inc.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff 20 Romolo 17, LP, a Delaware limited partnership, and against the Defaulted Defendant all persons claiming any legal or equitable right, title, estate, lien or interest in the property commonly known as 20 Romolo Place, San Francisco, CA, as follows:

Plaintff 20 Romolo 17, LP, a Delaware limited partnership, is the record owner of the real property commonly known as 20 Romolo Place, located in the City and County of San Francisco, CA, as described in Exhibit A attached to the judgment.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-28-2017 Continued To May-16-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
